$comment: Single source of truth for storefront-internal (staff-only/ops) path prefixes. Consumed by app/robots.ts (disallow), app/sitemap.ts (defensive filter against ever listing one of these) and next.config.mjs (X-Robots-Tag belt-and-suspenders header). Keep this the only place this list is written — see BACKLOG.md for the incident where /assess (a staff-only tool) was published in sitemap.xml with priority 0.6.
